Thesis: AI-orchestrated warehouse robotics with real IP (475+ patents) and a $22.7B backlog, but 85% Walmart revenue concentration, UNRELIABLE O'Glove earnings quality (headline FCF inflated ~4x by deferred-revenue timing; quality-adj. TTM owner earnings actually negative), and a share price 95%-600% above intrinsic value across every method even in the Accel scenario. PASS until earnings quality normalizes, concentration falls <70%, or price resets toward the $13-18 Base-IV zone.
